title: vitis mustangensis
intro: Vitis mustangensis, also known as the Mustang grape, is a species of grapevine native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its high content of tannins and antioxidants. The health benefits of Vitis mustangensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and vinegars, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
